prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: landing page hero
Primary request: wide editorial photo of a premium Nairobi-adjacent family home exterior for a real estate lead generation website
Scene/backdrop: upscale residential compound with lush but controlled landscaping, clean driveway, warm stone and wood finishes, believable gated neighborhood atmosphere
Subject: modern home exterior with strong curb appeal and realistic architectural proportions
Style/medium: premium editorial real estate photography
Composition/framing: wide composition with generous negative space for headline and CTA overlay, card-safe crop for desktop and mobile
Lighting/mood: soft golden daylight, calm and trustworthy mood, subtle depth
Color palette: sand, stone, charcoal, olive, warm wood
Materials/textures: real stone, glass, wood, concrete, trimmed greenery
Constraints: no text, no logos, no signage, no watermark, no people, no distorted lines, no exaggerated mansion tropes
